title: Single Mace
description: One Mace per minecraft server. Mace will tell everyone when dropped out of inventory that it is available again, and once one mace is created you can never make another mace again.
body:
# Single Mace

**Single Mace** limits the entire server to one mace. If **chaos** is what your looking for this is the perfect mod to put a **bounty** on anybodies head. 

## How Does It Work
Single mace will tell everyone in the server when the mace is lost. After a mace is lost the server allows players to craft a new mace. If 2 maces are made the new mace will be removed from the game and the player will get their heavy core and breeze rod back. Maces cannot be put into chests, shulkers, item frames etc. Maces can only be put into inventory, and e-chests to give the player a bigger bounty.

## Issues
Currently the mace is not tracked when not in somones inventory. If mace is dropped on the ground the game registers it as broken. I am currently working to fix this. If you notice any other issues please go to my github.
